query:
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status='error', 
    finished_at=DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR),
    error_message='Reset: allowing new sync attempt'
WHERE section='Boonphone' 
  AND entity='all' 
  AND status='error'
  AND started_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status='error', 
    finished_at=DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR),
    error_message='Reset: allowing new sync attempt'
WHERE section='Boonphone' 
  AND entity='all' 
  AND status='error'
  AND started_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 3;
